Text.Page:
Hey, you look like a nice . I know I shouldn’t even ask, but...well, you know, there’s this...person I like and, hmm...

Let me start over. Lately, my love life has been a bit—I'll just come out and say it—pathetic! But this girl...I think she might be the one.

Could you help a lonesome guy out and get this letter to her?

What’s this? Oh not another one! That's just wonderful.

Why would he think?

Forget it. Not your fault. Thank you, kindly.
